LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MATT SEASHOLS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WILL BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501, ON MAY 12, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES INVOLVING LEASE BREACHES PURSUANT TO SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 501. THE COURT HAS THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. ALL FUTURE LAW AND MOTION MATTERS IN THIS CASE MUST BE NOTICED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189 =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MATT SEASHOLS's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to specify which causes of action apply to which Defendants. Opposing party (Plaintiff) to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Continued To May-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MATT SEASHOLS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - This demurrer will be heard in Department 501, on May 12, 2017, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases involving lease breaches pursuant to SF Local Rule 8.10A1. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date to department 501. The court has the opposition and reply papers. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in department 501. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =(302/HK)
